Seamless Hosting

How It Works

Hosting should be about your guests, not the cleaning. Enjoy the celebration, and leave the details to us.

The Process

Effortless Elegance in 3 Steps

01

Choose Your Style

Browse our Curated Collections, Purna accessories, and Soma crystal barware online. If you need guidance, consult our experts on WhatsApp to match your exact theme, occasion, and guest count.

02

We Deliver & Style

Specify your delivery window. Our professional styling and delivery team arrives at your Mumbai home, carefully unboxing and setting up your tablescape to hotel-grade standards, ready for hosting.

03

Return Unwashed

When your celebration ends, simply place the plates, cutlery, and crystal back into our crates **completely unwashed**. Our team will collect them the next morning and professionally sanitize each piece.

Ready for Sahaj Satkar?

Host with complete confidence, and never wash a party plate again.

Exquisite Designs

Our Collections

Each range embodies a distinct aesthetic philosophy — from timeless classics to contemporary elegance.

Curated Collections

Explore the flagship Nitya, Parva, and Rajas ranges. Meticulously designed dinnerware settings tailored to match modern minimalism, traditional festive craftsmanship, or grand royal opulence.

Explore Curated Ranges

Purna Range

Complete your tablescape styling with the Purna range. Features gold-plated cutlery sets, artisan ceramic bowls, and luxury appetizer marble/wood boards to coordinate with your setup.

Explore Purna Accessories

Soma Range

Elevate every pour with hand-blown crystal glassware. Featuring cocktail coupés, everyday refreshment tumblers, spirits decanters, and double-walled gold-trimmed ice buckets.

Explore Soma Barware

The Atithé Standard

Every item in our Curated, Purna, and Soma ranges is sanitarily cleaned, hand-polished, and delivered in protected crates. No matter which styles you blend, we collect everything unwashed.

Flagship Ranges

Curated Collections

Nitya • Parva • Rajas

Our flagship ranges offer versatile elegance for any occasion — from everyday gatherings to special celebrations.

Nitya Range

Clean lines and timeless elegance create a sophisticated canvas for any occasion. Perfect for modern gatherings where understated elegance speaks volumes.

Parva Range

Intricate patterns and ornate details celebrate traditional craftsmanship. Ideal for festive occasions where heritage and artistry take center stage.

Rajas Range

Premier collection of unparalleled luxury. Reserved for grand celebrations where opulence and refinement define the atmosphere.

Why Atithé

Effortless Luxury • Zero Cleaning

The Atithé Advantage

Why Smart Hosts Choose Atithé

Time Reclaimed

Hours saved on shopping, washing, and storage mean more time enjoying your celebration and focusing on your guests.

Quality Guaranteed

Every piece is professionally inspected, cleaned, sanitized, and hand-polished between rentals to ensure flawless presentation.

Eco-Conscious Choice

Say absolute no to single-use plastic and paper disposables. Keep your home celebrations elegant and planet-kind.

Endless Variety

Access diverse premium collections for every single event theme without the cost, burden, or repetition of ownership.

Space Reclaimed

No cabinets, shelves, or storage boxes needed. Keep your kitchen storage free for items you use daily.

Confidence & Sustainability

Host with complete pride. Enjoy professionally maintained, luxury tableware with guilt-free hospitality.

Our Story

The Story Behind Atithé

Hetal Vagani • Sahaj Satkar

HV

Hetal Vagani

Founder, Atithé

A Note From Our Founder

Atithé was born out of a simple realization in my own Mumbai home: the most memorable gatherings are those where the host is fully present. Too often, the joy of welcoming friends is overshadowed by the anticipation of the clean-up—the hours spent washing delicate crystal, scouring platters, and finding space in already crowded cabinets. I believed there had to be a way to host with absolute elegance, without the burden that follows.

Great hosting should be a warm, effortless act of sharing, not a source of kitchen stress. That is why I founded Atithé. Our mission is to bring hotel-grade, hand-selected tableware directly to Mumbai homes, styled to perfection, and collect it the next day completely unwashed.

By taking care of both the preparation and the cleaning, we return the evening to you, allowing you to focus entirely on enjoying your celebration and connecting with your guests. Welcome to a new era of effortless hospitality.

Hetal Vagani
Quality
Convenience
Sustainability
Elegance

"Sahaj Satkar"

Derived from Hindi, Sahaj Satkar represents the art of **effortless hospitality**. It is the core philosophy at the heart of every Atithé delivery—our promise that hosting friends in your home should feel organic, warm, and entirely stress-free.
